text.tspan: • Curriculum focused on Molecular and Cellular Neuroscience, Computational Neuroscience, Neural Networks, and Neural Informatics
• Curriculum focused on general education and core STEM
Institute for Biohealth Innovation, George Mason University
• Completed administrative tasks as requested by research administration staff
• Received entry-level MRI training from a certified MRI Technologist
• Created simulation labs in computational computer networks
• Debugged and transferred hardware in student-rental laptops; configured networks and switches for IT labs
• Completed general office and lab duties as assigned
• Collaborating on manuscript preparation for a comparative anatomy and physiology education study
• Contributing to data interpretation, scientific writing, editing, and narrative development for peer-reviewed publication
• Selected to engage with leading neuroscience and technology researchers at world-renowned German universities and research institutes
• Will synthesize interdisciplinary STEM knowledge and explore cutting-edge research in neurotechnology, molecular biology, and bioengineering
• Administering the Fall 2026 budget and overseeing expense tracking for the student organization
• Assisted with hydroponic and aquaponic system maintenance, organic pest control, and nutrient balancing
